name: Giant Council
summary: Storm Giant-led supreme governing body of the Soreheim Alliance, advised by Decon Von Reckshem.
motive: Drive progress, enforce communal hierarchy, and keep the Alliance expanding under giant authority.
power_relations: Supreme over regional leaders and industrial organizations
Uses Frost and Hill Giant enforcers plus bureaucratic intermediaries
current_pressure: need to keep ambition from fracturing unity
visible_membership_base: Storm Giants, giant commanders, council aides, favored regional leaders.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Centralized authority produces cohesion, but also concentrates blame when the communal machine hurts people.
